data.text: P08, DUSTY AND CRATERIZED, PRO 0.320.040; PRV 1.730.436.608 ///
THE SURFACE WAS MAINLY COVERED WITH A DUSTY MATERIAL WHEN SOME OF
THESE CRATERS WERE FORMED, WITH THEIR DARK FLOORS AND THE RAYS .
THIS MADE THE REFLECTIVITY BRIGHTER WHEN THE DUST WAS BLOWN AWAY.
SOME OF THE NEWER CRATER OVERLAP OLDER ONES. ///SKINNYMON
